name: github_list_repo_contributors
description: List contributors to a repository (GET /repos/{owner}/{repo}/contributors). Results are sorted by number of commits per contributor (descending). Use `per_page` (1–100, default 100 when omitted) and `page`; responses include `page`, `per_page`, `pages_fetched`, and `pagination`. Set `all_pages` to follow `next` links up to `max_pages` (default **100**); if `truncated` is true, continue with `pagination.next` or increase `max_pages`. Returns 204 for an empty repository; that is surfaced as an empty `contributors` list. Optional `include_anonymous` maps to GitHub’s `anon` query parameter.
